idea-plugin.name: GLoC Reactor Generator
idea-plugin.description:
Generate GLoC reactor files from the Project view context menu.

Right-click any directory in the Project view and choose New → GLoC Reactor to open a dialog where you enter a name and choose whether to include neutron (event) dispatch. The plugin creates a ready-to-use .rs file at the selected path.

action.description: Create a new GLoC Reactor file
